product.name: Color
product.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

product.name: Arrangement
product.description: Specifies how flowers are arranged or presented, e.g. vase, basket

product.name: Stem length
product.description: Indicates the length of a flower's stem, such as short, medium, or long

product.name: Age group
product.description: Defines the target age range for a product, such as adults or kids

product.name: Target gender
product.description: Identifies the intended gender for a product, such as female, male or unisex

product.name: Size
product.description: Used to specify the size of a product, such as 0-3 months or Extra large (XL)

product.name: Google: Custom Product
product.description: Use to indicate whether or not the unique product identifiers (UPIs) GTIN, MPN, and brand are available for your product.

product.name: Plant characteristics
product.description: Defines specific traits of plants, e.g. flowering, edible

product.name: Plant name
product.description: Identifies the botanical or common name of the plant, such as rose, basil, or cucumber

product.name: Plant class
product.description: Classifies plants into specific taxonomic groups, e.g. liliopsida, brassicales

product.name: Accessory size
product.description: Defines the size of an accessory product, such as one size or compact

product.name: Suitable space
product.description: Defines the ideal location for product use, e.g. indoors, above ground

product.name: Product certifications & standards
product.description: Indicates the certifications or standards a product meets, such as organic or cruelty free

product.name: Constitutive ingredients
product.description: Specifies the main components used in a product's formulation, e.g. beeswax, rosehip oil

product.name: Flavor
product.description: Specifies the taste or flavor of a product, e.g. vanilla, mint

product.name: Decoration material
product.description: Identifies the material used for decoration, such as sequins or feathers

product.name: Allergen information
product.description: Indicates potential allergens present in food or beverages, such as wheat or peanuts

product.name: Flour/Grain type
product.description: Specifies the type of grain or flour in a product, e.g. corn, wheat

product.name: Package type
product.description: Defines the type of packaging for a product, e.g. jar, pump

product.name: Fruit source
product.description: Identifies whether fruit in drinks is from concentrate or not

product.name: Carry options
product.description: Specifies the carrying methods available for items, such as a handle or shoulder strap

product.name: Bag/Case material
product.description: Identifies the main material used in a bag or case, such as leather or canvas

product.name: Bag/Case features
product.description: Describes the unique characteristics of a bag or case, like waterproof or lightweight

product.name: Bag/Case storage features
product.description: Identifies unique storage elements in bags or cases, such as adjustable dividers or external pockets

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 4
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 3
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 2
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 1
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 0
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Size System
variant.description: The country of the size system used by your product.

variant.name: Google: Gender
variant.description: The gender for which your product is intended.

variant.name: Google: Condition
variant.description: The condition of your product at time of sale.

variant.name: Google: Age Group
variant.description: The demographic for which your product is intended.

shop.name: Google: Show Store Widget App Embed Block
shop.description: Indicates if the store widget app embed block should be shown.
